title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs · Eval Recall
summary: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a durable task state and handoff record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.
Store durable task details in files or structured summaries before context compaction.
Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
Use a changed review case derived from this module: prompt long context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Handoff Quality trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.

content.text: For Handoff Quality, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Handoff Quality precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.
Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed review case derived from this module: prompt long context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A list of edited filenames is a complete handoff.

stimulus.title: Handoff Quality case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: prompt long context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A list of edited filenames is a complete handoff.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery. Artifact under review: a durable task state and handoff record.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Handoff Quality, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

content.text: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: prompt long context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies State Summary, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a durable task state and handoff record.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Conversation length itself preserves every important decision. This fails the State Summary contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Handoff Quality applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
